title: Monday.com for accounting practices

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello the community!

We are in a Beta phase of our monday.com solution for Accounting Practices. We are looking for accounting practices to test it! If you are curious, shoot us a note here.

The solution will help you manage your accounting and bookkeeping team, their tasks, get a high level overview and make sure you deliver your clients what you’ve promised!

You will receive a 10% discount as part of testing

Cheers,

Elena from Kick Consulting

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: hello, i know this is an old post but just wondering if services are still offered?

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tori,

We have now released the accounting practice solution. I would love to give you a demo.

Elena
Kick Consulting
